tasks.title: security: bump dompurify >= 3.4.0 (4 open dependabot CVEs)
acceptance_criteria: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml resolves dompurify to >= 3.4.0
Dependabot alerts #209-#212 close automatically after merge
Frontend `pnpm test` and `pnpm build` remain green
tasks.testing: Vitest + existing playwright suites must stay green

tasks.title: security: bump wheel >= 0.46.2 in backend image (CVE-2026-24049)
acceptance_criteria: Built backend image reports `wheel >= 0.46.2` from `pip show wheel`
Trivy nightly scan no longer flags CVE-2026-24049 (alerts #336, #337)
tasks.security: Privilege escalation via malicious wheel unpacking
tasks.testing: pytest backend unit suite stays green

tasks.title: security: bump jaraco.context >= 6.1.0 in backend image (CVE-2026-23949 Zip Slip)
acceptance_criteria: Built backend image reports `jaraco.context >= 6.1.0`
Trivy alert #332 closes
tasks.security: Tar archive path traversal in setuptools vendor copy
tasks.testing: Backend unit + integration suites stay green

tasks.title: security: bump pip >= 25.3 in backend image (CVE-2025-8869, CVE-2026-1703, CVE-2026-6357)
acceptance_criteria: Built backend image reports `pip >= 25.3`
Trivy alerts #333, #334, #335 close
tasks.security: Symlink + path-traversal + ACE during wheel install
tasks.testing: Image build smoke test passes

tasks.title: scalability: migrate conversion_jobs_db from in-memory dict to Redis/Postgres
acceptance_criteria: `conversion_jobs_db` global dict is removed from backend/src/main.py
Job lookups (status, progress, download) read from Redis cache → Postgres fallback
Two-instance smoke test: job created on instance A is queryable from instance B
Existing single-instance tests continue to pass
Zero-downtime migration documented in `docs/runbook.md`
tasks.security: No new auth surface; reuses existing get_db dependency
tasks.testing: Add backend integration test covering cross-instance lookup via mock Redis

tasks.title: scalability: replace local Docker volumes with Tigris/S3 object storage
acceptance_criteria: `backend/src/core/storage.py` S3 backend stub implemented and wired
TEMP_UPLOADS_DIR / CONVERSION_OUTPUTS_DIR / conversion-cache writes go through StorageManager
fly.toml + docker-compose.prod.yml no longer mount `:/app/cache`, `:/app/data/temp_uploads`, `:/app/data/conversion_outputs` as local volumes in production
Existing local-disk path stays available behind `STORAGE_BACKEND=local` for dev
tasks.security: Use IAM-scoped Tigris keys; no public ACLs; signed URLs for downloads
tasks.testing: Integration test that uploads → AI engine reads → backend serves download via S3 backend

tasks.title: rate-limits: switch /api/v1/conversions to per-authenticated-user limits (smoke-test failure)
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated requests are keyed by `user.id`, not by client IP, in the redis sliding-window limiter
Anonymous requests retain per-IP limits (defense in depth)
scripts/beta_smoke_test.py passes 15/15 on three consecutive runs against staging
X-RateLimit-* response headers reflect the per-key counter actually used
tasks.security: Reduces risk of one CGNAT IP exhausting limits for many real users
tasks.testing: Add backend test covering both auth & anon limiter key paths

tasks.title: security: fix CodeQL js/log-injection alerts in websocket.ts + ConversionProgress.tsx (#76, #77, #78)
acceptance_criteria: User-controlled values are stripped of `\r\n` (or HTML-escaped if rendered) before being passed to console.log/info/error
All three CodeQL alerts (#76, #77, #78) close in next nightly scan
tasks.testing: Add unit tests asserting newline stripping in the helper function

tasks.title: security: fix CodeQL js/xss-through-dom alert in ConversionAssetsUpload.tsx (#75)
acceptance_criteria: DOM text is no longer reinterpreted as HTML at line 179 of ConversionAssetsUpload.tsx
If markup must be rendered, route through DOMPurify ≥ 3.4.0 (depends on issue #1)
CodeQL alert #75 closes
tasks.testing: Add unit test confirming sanitization of attacker-controlled asset metadata

tasks.title: security: fix CodeQL js/tainted-format-string alert in services/api.ts (#74)
acceptance_criteria: Untrusted input is passed via the `%s` placeholder (or escaped) before being used as a format string
CodeQL alert #74 closes
tasks.testing: Vitest run of the api service module

tasks.title: scaling: extract AI Engine to its own Fly.io app (portkit-ai-engine)
acceptance_criteria: New `fly.ai-engine.toml` (or app folder) deploys to `portkit-ai-engine` on `performance-cpu-2x`
Backend `AI_ENGINE_URL` points at the new internal Fly.io address
Backend image no longer co-runs the AI engine in the same VM in production
Conversion smoke test passes end-to-end against the extracted app
tasks.security: Internal Fly.io network only; no public ingress for AI Engine
tasks.testing: scripts/beta_smoke_test.py --env staging passes after split

tasks.title: scaling: add Fly.io auto-scale config (concurrency block + max_machines_running)
acceptance_criteria: [[services.concurrency]] block defined with type=requests, soft_limit=50, hard_limit=100 (tunable)
[http_service] sets `min_machines_running = 1` and `max_machines_running = 5`
k6 stress test scales from 1 → ≥3 machines and back down within 10 minutes
tasks.testing: load-tests/k6 stress scenario covers the elastic range

tasks.title: scaling: replace Celery `--concurrency=4` with `--autoscale=8,2`
acceptance_criteria: Worker process command line uses `--autoscale=8,2`
Worker memory ceiling can sustain 8 concurrent conversions (or doc says otherwise and reduces ceiling)
Worker logs report scale-up / scale-down events under load
tasks.testing: k6 load test confirms queue depth drops under sustained load

tasks.title: conversion-quality: close coverage gap on the 1,661 unconverted Create recipes (top B2B lever)
acceptance_criteria: Audit `conversion_outputs/` for the 8-mod baseline and report current Create recipe hit-rate
Add coverage for `create:compacting`, multi-output probability handling, and tag-based ingredient resolution (`#forge:ingots/iron` etc.)
Aggregate recipe coverage on the 8-mod baseline rises from 45.0% by ≥3pp
Document Bedrock approximations chosen for machine-mechanic-dependent recipes (RPM-gated deploying, etc.)
tasks.testing: Add ai-engine unit tests for each newly handled Create recipe type

tasks.title: rag: upgrade embedding model text-embedding-ada-002 → text-embedding-3-large
acceptance_criteria: RAG retrieval uses `text-embedding-3-large` (or `-small` for cost) by default
pgvector dimension migration runs cleanly and is reversible
Retrieval-quality smoke test (top-5 hit rate on labeled Java→Bedrock pairs) improves vs ada-002 baseline
Cost-per-conversion is tracked in `docs/COST-OPTIMIZATION.md` after the change
tasks.testing: Add `tests/rag/test_retrieval_quality.py` with labeled fixture set

tasks.title: scaling: deploy frontend SPA to a CDN (Vercel / Cloudflare Pages / Tigris)
acceptance_criteria: Production frontend is served from a CDN with global PoPs (not from the Fly.io nginx container)
API requests still proxy correctly via the chosen CDN's edge config
Lighthouse perf score on the home page ≥90 from at least 3 geographies
tasks.security: Preserve existing CSP headers; do not loosen frame-ancestors
tasks.testing: scripts/beta_smoke_test.py passes against the CDN host

tasks.title: scaling: add Postgres read replica + route SELECT-only endpoints to readonly_database_url
acceptance_criteria: `get_db()` accepts a read-only flag that returns a session bound to `READONLY_DATABASE_URL` when set
Analytics, history, and listing endpoints opt in to the read-only pool
Replica lag is exported as a Prometheus metric
tasks.testing: Add an integration test that proves writes still hit primary when readonly DSN is set

tasks.title: ci: ratchet backend coverage floor 40% → 50% (per documented M1 promotion criterion)
acceptance_criteria: Confirm `main` has been ≥55% for ≥4 weeks (per `docs/ci/coverage-policy.md` M1 criterion); link the supporting Codecov runs
Set `COVERAGE_FLOOR_BACKEND=50` in `.github/workflows/pr.yml`
Update the Ratchet Milestones table in `docs/ci/coverage-policy.md`
tasks.testing: PR pipeline must pass at the new floor on this PR itself

tasks.title: ci: ratchet AI Engine coverage floor 65% → 70% (per documented M1 promotion criterion)
acceptance_criteria: Confirm `main` has been ≥75% for ≥4 weeks; link the supporting runs
Set `COVERAGE_FLOOR_AI_ENGINE=70` in `.github/workflows/pr.yml`
Update the Ratchet Milestones table in `docs/ci/coverage-policy.md`
tasks.testing: PR pipeline must pass at the new floor on this PR itself

tasks.title: ci: add an enforced frontend coverage gate (vitest currently runs without --coverage)
acceptance_criteria: Frontend job runs `vitest run --coverage` and uploads to Codecov
Initial floor set just below current measured coverage (per repo's floor-and-ratchet policy)
Coverage policy doc updated to describe frontend ratchet plan
tasks.testing: PR pipeline runs the new gate

tasks.title: feat: add webhook notifications for batch conversion completion (Enterprise Phase 1)
acceptance_criteria: Users can register a webhook URL per workspace, signed with HMAC SHA-256
On batch completion the backend POSTs `batch.completed` with retry/backoff and DLQ on permanent failure
Endpoint is documented in `docs/API.md` / `docs/api-reference.md`
tasks.security: Reject http:// in production unless allowlisted; SSRF guard on registered URLs
tasks.testing: Backend integration test covers signature verification and retry behaviour
